name: FctsIdsLfstylRateFctrLoad

text.value: WITH CTE AS (SELECT LFSTYL_RATE_FCTR_SK, LFSTYL_RATE_FCTR_ID, MBR_LFSTYL_BNF_CD, LFSTYL_RATE_FCTR_EFF_DT, SRC_SYS_CD, CRT_RUN_CYC_EXCTN_SK, LAST_UPDT_RUN_CYC_EXCTN_SK, MBR_LFSTYL_BNF_CD_SK, LFSTYL_RATE_FCTR_TERM_DT, LFSTYL_RATE_FCTR FROM @{pipeline().globalParameters.gbl_param_ids_staging}.EG01_TMP_FctsIdsLfstylRateFctrLoad) UPDATE T SET T.LFSTYL_RATE_FCTR_ID = C.LFSTYL_RATE_FCTR_ID, T.MBR_LFSTYL_BNF_CD = C.MBR_LFSTYL_BNF_CD, T.LFSTYL_RATE_FCTR_EFF_DT = C.LFSTYL_RATE_FCTR_EFF_DT, T.SRC_SYS_CD = C.SRC_SYS_CD, T.LAST_UPDT_RUN_CYC_EXCTN_SK = C.LAST_UPDT_RUN_CYC_EXCTN_SK, T.MBR_LFSTYL_BNF_CD_SK = C.MBR_LFSTYL_BNF_CD_SK, T.LFSTYL_RATE_FCTR_TERM_DT = C.LFSTYL_RATE_FCTR_TERM_DT, T.LFSTYL_RATE_FCTR = C.LFSTYL_RATE_FCTR FROM @{pipeline().globalParameters.gbl_param_IDSOwner}.LFSTYL_RATE_FCTR T JOIN CTE C ON T.LFSTYL_RATE_FCTR_SK = C.LFSTYL_RATE_FCTR_SK INSERT INTO @{pipeline().globalParameters.gbl_param_IDSOwner}.LFSTYL_RATE_FCTR (LFSTYL_RATE_FCTR_SK, LFSTYL_RATE_FCTR_ID, MBR_LFSTYL_BNF_CD, LFSTYL_RATE_FCTR_EFF_DT, SRC_SYS_CD, CRT_RUN_CYC_EXCTN_SK, LAST_UPDT_RUN_CYC_EXCTN_SK, MBR_LFSTYL_BNF_CD_SK, LFSTYL_RATE_FCTR_TERM_DT, LFSTYL_RATE_FCTR) SELECT C.LFSTYL_RATE_FCTR_SK, C.LFSTYL_RATE_FCTR_ID, C.MBR_LFSTYL_BNF_CD, C.LFSTYL_RATE_FCTR_EFF_DT, C.SRC_SYS_CD, C.CRT_RUN_CYC_EXCTN_SK, C.LAST_UPDT_RUN_CYC_EXCTN_SK, C.MBR_LFSTYL_BNF_CD_SK, C.LFSTYL_RATE_FCTR_TERM_DT, C.LFSTYL_RATE_FCTR FROM CTE C LEFT JOIN @{pipeline().globalParameters.gbl_param_IDSOwner}.LFSTYL_RATE_FCTR T ON T.LFSTYL_RATE_FCTR_SK = C.LFSTYL_RATE_FCTR_SK WHERE T.LFSTYL_RATE_FCTR_SK IS NULL
